TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Sinka, title = Sinka, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sinka} }

S.FORM: alang Sinka ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taznin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 18 buwan, 42 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 41 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 1 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 88%, binah lihuyan s'uli 10%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Sinka hya' ga Dralendren. tay mkyahu' na Sinka hya' ga Aljungic. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Sinka ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Sinka ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Sinka ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taznin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 18 buwan, 42 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 41 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 1 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 88%, binah lihuyan s'uli 10%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Sinka hya' ga Dralendren. tay mkyahu' na Sinka hya' ga Aljungic. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Sinka ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Sinka ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕinka ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu taznin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli **%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕinka ħjaʔ ɣa *ralen*ren. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕinka ħjaʔ ɣa aljuŋiʦ~ʨ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ s~ɕinka ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ s~ɕinka ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
